# CodeHumanist

> Read-only codebase comprehension platform for human stakeholders. Understand
> AI-generated codebases — architecture, data flows, use cases — without
> touching a line of code. AI writes the code; you still need to know what it
> does, how it's structured, and where the risk sits.

## About

CodeHumanist is a SaaS platform from Instilligent Limited (NZ) for the people
who matter most to a business but can't read code: founders reviewing what
their AI-built product actually does, product managers reasoning about a
codebase they didn't write, compliance officers auditing AI-generated systems,
investors doing technical due diligence, and operators inheriting handoff from
a vibe-coding sprint.

Vibe coding and AI-generated software changed who writes the code — but not
who needs to understand it. CodeHumanist closes that gap.

## What it does

- **System Overview** — plain-English summary of what your codebase does, its
  core purpose, and how all the pieces fit together. No jargon, no assumptions.
- **Architecture Maps** — visual diagrams of services, databases, APIs, and
  integrations rendered for non-developers.
- **Use Cases & Data Model** — what the system actually does as business logic,
  not code: user journeys, core entities, data relationships.
- **Risk surfacing** — flags the parts of the codebase most likely to hide
  surprises (auth, payments, data exfil paths) for stakeholder review.

## Who it's for

- Founders evaluating their own AI-built product
- Product managers reasoning about an inherited codebase
- Compliance and audit functions reviewing AI-generated systems
- Investors doing technical due diligence
- Operators inheriting handoff from a sprint of AI coding

## Status

Currently in waitlist phase. Visit https://codehumanist.com to join.

## Built by

Instilligent Limited — https://instilligent.com — NZ AI consultancy and
product studio. We build production AI software for regulated industries
across NZ, Australia, and Southeast Asia.
